news.title: Magnitude 5.0 earthquake strikes Himachal Pradesh’s Chamba district
news.description: A 5.0-magnitude earthquake struck Chamba in Himachal Pradesh late Friday night, while a 2.8-magnitude tremor was also reported in Sikkim.
news.content:
An earthquake of magnitude 5.0 struck Chamba in Himachal Pradesh on Friday, reported the National Centre of Seismology (NCS).
